rebook_confirmed.description: Customer confirms rebooking an appointment — HIGH VALUE, should be processed immediately

transcript.content: Hello, am I speaking with Mr. Sharma?
Haan ji, bol raha hoon.
Sir, I'm calling from Cashify regarding your phone evaluation. Your appointment was scheduled for yesterday but we couldn't connect. Can we reschedule?
Oh haan, kal main busy tha. Tomorrow works for me.
Sure sir, what time works for you tomorrow?
3 PM ke baad chalega.
I'll book your slot for 3:30 PM tomorrow. Is that fine?
Haan theek hai, confirmed.
Thank you sir. Our executive will visit you tomorrow at 3:30 PM. Thank you and have a good day.
Thank you, bye.

not_interested.description: Customer clearly not interested — LOW VALUE, can be processed in batch

transcript.content: Hello, am I speaking with Ms. Gupta?
Yes.
Ma'am, I'm calling from XYZ regarding the insurance plan you inquired about.
I'm not interested. Please don't call me again.
I understand ma'am. Sorry for the inconvenience. Have a good day.
Bye.

callback_requested.description: Customer asks to be called back later — MEDIUM VALUE, ambiguous

transcript.content: Hello sir, am I speaking with Rajesh?
Haan, kaun bol raha hai?
Sir, I'm calling from ABC about your loan application.
Abhi main meeting mein hoon, baad mein call karo.
Sure sir, when should I call you back?
Shaam ko 6 baje ke baad.
Okay sir, I'll call you after 6 PM today. Thank you.
Theek hai.

demo_booked.description: Customer books a product demo — HIGH VALUE, should be processed immediately

transcript.content: Good afternoon, am I speaking with Priya?
Yes, hi.
Priya, I'm following up on your interest in our CRM software. Would you like to see a live demo?
Actually yes, I've been meaning to check it out. Can we do it this week?
Absolutely! How about Thursday at 11 AM?
Thursday works. Let me just block my calendar.
I'll send you a calendar invite with the meeting link. Your registered email is priya@company.com, correct?
Yes, that's right.
Perfect. Demo is booked for Thursday 11 AM. Looking forward to it!
Thanks, see you then.

already_purchased.description: Customer already completed the action — LOW VALUE, batch is fine

transcript.content: Hello, is this Amit?
Yes.
Amit, I'm calling about the health checkup package you were interested in.
Oh, I already booked it through your website last week.
That's great to hear! Is there anything else I can help with?
No, that's all. Thanks.
Thank you Amit, have a great day.

short_call_hangup.description: Very short call — customer hung up immediately. Should skip LLM entirely.

transcript.content: Hello, am I speaking with—
Wrong number.

hinglish_ambiguous.description: Hinglish conversation where intent is ambiguous — keyword match alone cannot classify

transcript.content: Hello sir, Formi se bol raha hoon. Aapka trial period khatam ho raha hai.
Haan, mujhe pata hai. Main soch raha hoon.
Sir, kya aap renew karna chahenge? Abhi 20% discount chal raha hai.
Dekhta hoon, kuch sochna padega. Budget tight hai but product accha hai.
Main ek follow-up schedule kar doon?
Haan, next week bol lo.
Done sir, next week call karunga. Thank you.
Okay bye.

escalation_needed.description: Customer is angry and needs escalation — HIGH VALUE for different reasons

transcript.content: Hello, am I speaking with Mr. Verma?
Yes, and I've been waiting 3 days for my pickup! This is unacceptable.
I sincerely apologize for the delay sir. Let me check your order status.
I've already called 4 times. Nobody helps. I want to speak to a manager.
Sir, I understand your frustration. Let me escalate this immediately and have a senior executive call you within the hour.
Fine, but if nobody calls me back I'm going to file a complaint.
You'll receive a call within 60 minutes, sir. I'm personally noting your case.
Okay.
